stemHtml: Why is the wind in the METAR different from the wind broadcasted by the ATIS?

options.a: In the ATIS, it is the average of the last 2 min. In the METAR, the surface wind is the average of the last 10 minutes.
options.b: In the ATIS, it is the average of the last 10 min. In the METAR, the surface wind is the average of the last 2 minutes.
options.c: In the ATIS, it is the average of the last 5 min. In the METAR, the surface wind is the average of the last 10 minutes.
options.d: Because the surface wind is measured at different locations and heights.
